case_title: GEBREMICAEL, ADEN ADIAM VS NIHO, CHRISTINE NOBUKO C/O OTR/L DEPT OF REHAB/-

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $949.40 FILED BY GEBREMICAEL, ADEN ADIAM AS TO DEFENDANT NIHO, CHRISTINE NOBUKO   C/O OTR/L DEPT OF REHAB/- ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NIHO, CHRISTINE NOBUKO   C/O OTR/L DEPT OF REHAB/- IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GEBREMICAEL, ADEN ADIAM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
